Skip to contents
gpbiometrics 0.2.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Cluster-permutation workflow
    • gpbiometrics workflow
    • Plot gallery
  • Changelog

Package index

Reviewer and manuscript report templates

Helpers for generating conservative manuscript-ready methods, quality-control, reproducibility, and audit-summary text from Gazepoint workflow objects.

create_gazepoint_methods_section()
Create a compact Gazepoint methods section
create_gazepoint_qc_supplement()
Create a Gazepoint quality-control supplement section
create_gazepoint_reproducibility_statement()
Create a Gazepoint reproducibility statement
create_gazepoint_audit_report_section()
Create a Gazepoint audit-report section

Experimental statistical extensions

Experimental helpers for conservative time-course inference on Gazepoint-derived signals. Advanced functions in this section include guardrails and export helpers; they should not be interpreted as validated advanced inferential engines.

prepare_gazepoint_timecourse_test_data()
Prepare Gazepoint time-course data for cluster permutation testing
run_gazepoint_cluster_permutation()
Run a conservative cluster-based permutation test for Gazepoint time courses
summarize_gazepoint_time_clusters()
Summarize Gazepoint time clusters
plot_gazepoint_cluster_permutation()
Plot Gazepoint cluster permutation results
audit_gazepoint_timecourse_grid()
Audit the participant-condition-time grid for cluster-permutation analysis
diagnose_gazepoint_cluster_design()
Diagnose whether a design is suitable for cluster-permutation analysis
plot_gazepoint_cluster_null_distribution()
Plot the cluster-permutation null distribution
report_gazepoint_cluster_permutation()
Create conservative reporting text for a cluster-permutation result
run_gazepoint_cluster_threshold_sensitivity()
Run threshold-sensitivity checks for cluster-permutation analysis
simulate_gazepoint_cluster_timecourse_data()
Simulate two-condition time-course data for cluster-permutation examples
export_gazepoint_cluster_results()
Export cluster-permutation result components
run_gazepoint_cluster_permutation_anova()
Guardrail for cluster-permutation ANOVA
run_gazepoint_cluster_permutation_lmer()
Guardrail for mixed-model cluster permutation
run_gazepoint_tfce()
Guardrail for threshold-free cluster enhancement
run_gazepoint_multidimensional_cluster_permutation()
Guardrail for multidimensional cluster permutation
estimate_gazepoint_cluster_onset()
Guardrail against exact cluster-onset estimation
estimate_gazepoint_cluster_offset()
Guardrail against exact cluster-offset estimation
run_gazepoint_cluster_permutation_covariate_adjusted()
Guardrail for covariate-adjusted cluster permutation
run_gazepoint_cluster_permutation_parallel()
Guardrail for high-performance cluster permutation
export_gazepoint_mne_cluster_input()
Export time-course data for MNE cluster-permutation workflows
export_gazepoint_permuco_cluster_input()
Export time-course data for permuco cluster workflows
export_gazepoint_permutes_cluster_input()
Export time-course data for permutes cluster workflows

Data import, cleaning, and simulation

import_gazepoint_data()
Import Gazepoint export files from a session folder
impute_gazepoint_missing()
Impute missing values in Gazepoint signals
simulate_gazepoint_eye_data()
Simulate Gazepoint-style gaze and pupil data

Pupil, gaze, and fixation workflows

detect_gazepoint_pupil_blinks()
Detect blink intervals from Gazepoint pupil data
clean_gazepoint_pupil_signal()
Clean Gazepoint pupil signal
filter_gazepoint_gaze()
Filter implausible Gazepoint gaze samples
summarize_gazepoint_fixations()
Summarize Gazepoint fixation metrics

EDA, SCR, RR, and engagement indices

epoch_gazepoint_scr()
Epoch Gazepoint SCR/EDA data around events
normalize_gazepoint_scr()
Normalize Gazepoint SCR amplitudes
flag_gazepoint_rr_outliers()
Flag outlying Gazepoint RR/IBI intervals
compute_gazepoint_engagement_index()
Compute engagement-dial summary indices

Modeling, reports, and workflow pipelines

create_gazepoint_trial_regressors()
Create Gazepoint trial-level regressors for modeling
report_gazepoint_data_quality()
Report Gazepoint data quality
preprocess_gazepoint_all()
Preprocess all available Gazepoint channels

Toolbox-style and interoperability workflows

check_gazepoint_pyhrv_interval()
Check whether NN intervals are inside a plausible interval
combine_gazepoint_marker_channels_pspm_style()
Combine multiple Gazepoint marker channels PsPM-style
compare_gazepoint_pyhrv_psd_methods()
Compare pyHRV-style PSD methods
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_ar_psd()
Compute pyHRV-style autoregressive PSD
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_dfa()
Compute detrended fluctuation analysis
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_frequency_domain()
Compute pyHRV-style frequency-domain summary
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_heart_rate()
Compute heart rate from NN intervals
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_hr_parameters()
Compute pyHRV-style heart-rate parameters
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_lomb_psd()
Compute pyHRV-style Lomb PSD
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_nn_diff()
Compute NN interval differences
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_nn20()
Compute NN20 and pNN20
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_nn50()
Compute NN50 and pNN50
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_nni_differences_parameters()
Compute pyHRV-style NNI difference parameters
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_nni_parameters()
Compute pyHRV-style NNI parameters
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_nnxx()
Compute NNxx and pNNxx
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_nonlinear()
Compute pyHRV-style nonlinear summary
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_poincare()
Compute pyHRV-style Poincare measures
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_psd_waterfall()
Compute pyHRV-style PSD waterfall over segments
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_rmssd()
Compute RMSSD
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_sample_entropy()
Compute sample entropy
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_sdann()
Compute SDANN
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_sdnn()
Compute SDNN
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_sdnn_index()
Compute SDNN index
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_sdsd()
Compute SDSD
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_time_domain()
Compute pyHRV-style time-domain summary
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_tinn()
Compute TINN
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_triangular_index()
Compute triangular index
compute_gazepoint_pyhrv_welch_psd()
Compute pyHRV-style Welch PSD
create_gazepoint_heartpy_report()
Create HeartPy-style report tables for Gazepoint pulse/PPG data
create_gazepoint_pspm_glm_design()
Create PsPM-style convolution GLM design matrix
create_gazepoint_pyhrv_time_vector()
Create a time vector from NN intervals
export_gazepoint_biometrics_report_bundle()
Export a Gazepoint biometrics report bundle
export_gazepoint_heartpy_input()
Export Gazepoint pulse/PPG data for HeartPy-style workflows
export_gazepoint_pspm_model_estimates()
Export PsPM-style Gazepoint model estimates
export_gazepoint_pyhrv_results()
Export pyHRV-style results
export_gazepoint_rhrv_input()
Export Gazepoint IBI data for RHRV-style workflows
extract_gazepoint_eda_events_biosppy_style()
Extract BioSPPy-style EDA events from Gazepoint GSR/EDA data
extract_gazepoint_markerinfo_pspm_style()
Extract PsPM-style marker information from Gazepoint biometrics data
extract_gazepoint_pyhrv_nn_intervals()
Extract NN intervals from peak timestamps
extract_gazepoint_segments_pspm_style()
Extract event-centred Gazepoint segments PsPM-style
import_gazepoint_pyhrv_results()
Import pyHRV-style results
merge_gazepoint_recordings_pspm_style()
Merge multiple Gazepoint recordings PsPM-style
optimize_gazepoint_cvxeda_tau()
Optimise subject-specific cvxEDA slow time constant
plot_gazepoint_pyhrv_hr_heatplot()
Plot pyHRV-style heart-rate heatplot
plot_gazepoint_pyhrv_radar_chart()
Plot pyHRV-style radar chart
plot_gazepoint_pyhrv_tachogram()
Plot pyHRV-style tachogram
prepare_gazepoint_aoi_biometrics_model_data()
Prepare AOI-biometric model data
prepare_gazepoint_artifact_svm_features()
Prepare EDA artifact-classifier segment features
prepare_gazepoint_biometrics_lme_data()
Prepare Gazepoint biometric summaries for mixed-model analysis
prepare_gazepoint_ctsi_input()
Prepare Gazepoint EDA data for CTSI sparse deconvolution workflows
prepare_gazepoint_cvxeda_input()
Prepare Gazepoint EDA input for external cvxEDA-style workflows
prepare_gazepoint_heartpy_input()
Prepare Gazepoint pulse/PPG data for HeartPy-style workflows
prepare_gazepoint_ledalab_input()
Prepare Gazepoint EDA input for external Ledalab-style workflows
prepare_gazepoint_multimodal_model_data()
Prepare Gazepoint multimodal model data
prepare_gazepoint_neurokit_eda_input()
Prepare Gazepoint EDA input for NeuroKit2-style workflows
prepare_gazepoint_pspm_dcm_input()
Prepare Gazepoint EDA data for PsPM DCM workflows
prepare_gazepoint_pspm_input()
Prepare Gazepoint EDA input for external PsPM-style workflows
prepare_gazepoint_pyppg_input()
Prepare Gazepoint HRP/PPG waveform input for pyPPG
prepare_gazepoint_rhrv_input()
Prepare Gazepoint IBI/RR data for RHRV
prepare_gazepoint_scr_hurdle_model_data()
Prepare Gazepoint SCR hurdle-model data
preprocess_gazepoint_scr_pspm_style()
Preprocess Gazepoint SCR/GSR data PsPM-style
process_gazepoint_ppg_heartpy_style()
Run a full HeartPy-style Gazepoint pulse/PPG process
run_gazepoint_biosppy_eda()
Run BioSPPy-style Gazepoint EDA processing
run_gazepoint_biosppy_ppg()
Run BioSPPy-style Gazepoint PPG/BVP processing
run_gazepoint_heartpy_crosscheck()
Run a Gazepoint pulse/PPG cross-check against HeartPy when available
run_gazepoint_neurokit_eda_crosscheck()
Optionally run a NeuroKit2 EDA cross-check
run_gazepoint_pyhrv_style()
Run pyHRV-style Gazepoint HRV analysis
segment_gazepoint_pyhrv_nni()
Segment NN intervals into time windows
split_gazepoint_sessions_pspm_style()
Split Gazepoint recordings into PsPM-style sessions
trim_gazepoint_biometrics_pspm_style()
Trim Gazepoint biometrics data PsPM-style

Quality control, diagnostics, and plots

assess_gazepoint_hrp_waveform_quality()
Assess Gazepoint HRP waveform quality
audit_gazepoint_biometric_missingness()
Audit missingness in Gazepoint biometric channels
audit_gazepoint_biometric_sampling()
Audit Gazepoint biometric sampling and timing
audit_gazepoint_biometric_sync_drift()
Audit Gazepoint biometric synchronization drift
audit_gazepoint_distributional_drift()
Audit distributional drift across sessions or ordered blocks
audit_gazepoint_eda_artifacts()
Audit Gazepoint EDA/GSR artifacts
audit_gazepoint_engagement_dial()
Audit Gazepoint engagement-dial signal quality
audit_gazepoint_gsr_quality()
Audit Gazepoint GSR/EDA signal quality
audit_gazepoint_gsr_units()
Audit likely GSR/EDA units
audit_gazepoint_hr_quality()
Audit Gazepoint heart-rate signal quality
audit_gazepoint_ibi_quality()
Audit IBI/RR interval quality
audit_gazepoint_signal_activity()
Audit Gazepoint biometric signal activity
audit_gazepoint_stabilization_period()
Audit or trim the EDA electrode stabilization period
audit_gazepoint_time_resets()
Audit Gazepoint biometric time resets
check_gazepoint_plot_contract()
Check a Gazepoint plot return contract
check_gazepoint_ppg_binary_quality()
Check binary quality of Gazepoint pulse/PPG analysis results
create_gazepoint_biometrics_report()
Create a Gazepoint Biometrics report
create_gazepoint_biometrics_report_tables()
Create Gazepoint Biometrics report tables
create_gazepoint_heartpy_report()
Create HeartPy-style report tables for Gazepoint pulse/PPG data
diagnose_gazepoint_biometrics_workflow()
Diagnose a Gazepoint Biometrics workflow
export_gazepoint_biometrics_report_bundle()
Export a Gazepoint biometrics report bundle
flag_gazepoint_artifacts_svm()
Flag EDA artifacts with a user-supplied SVM-style model
flag_gazepoint_biometric_dropouts()
Flag biometric dropouts and flatline periods
flag_gazepoint_mad_artifacts()
Flag MAD-based EDA wearable artifacts
flag_gazepoint_rr_outliers()
Flag outlying Gazepoint RR/IBI intervals
flag_kleckner_eda_artifacts()
Flag EDA artifacts using transparent Kleckner-style heuristics
get_gazepoint_plot_data()
Extract stored plot data
get_gazepoint_plot_settings()
Extract stored plot settings
plot_gazepoint_aoi_biometrics()
Plot AOI-linked biometric summaries
plot_gazepoint_biometric_quality()
Plot Gazepoint biometric quality indicators
plot_gazepoint_biometric_report_dashboard()
Create a lightweight Gazepoint biometric QC plot dashboard
plot_gazepoint_biometric_signals()
Plot Gazepoint biometric signal time series
plot_gazepoint_eda_decomposition()
Plot Gazepoint EDA decomposition channels
plot_gazepoint_eda_gram()
Plot an EDA-gram-style time-frequency representation
plot_gazepoint_multimodal_timeline()
Plot multimodal Gazepoint biometric timelines
plot_gazepoint_ppg_breathing()
Plot breathing-rate spectrum from Gazepoint RR/IBI intervals
plot_gazepoint_ppg_peak_detection()
Plot Gazepoint pulse/PPG peak detection results
plot_gazepoint_ppg_poincare()
Plot a Poincare plot from Gazepoint pulse/PPG peaks or RR intervals
plot_gazepoint_ppg_segmentwise()
Plot segmentwise Gazepoint pulse/PPG measures
plot_gazepoint_pyhrv_hr_heatplot()
Plot pyHRV-style heart-rate heatplot
plot_gazepoint_pyhrv_radar_chart()
Plot pyHRV-style radar chart
plot_gazepoint_pyhrv_tachogram()
Plot pyHRV-style tachogram
plot_gazepoint_saccade_main_sequence()
Plot Gazepoint saccade main-sequence diagnostics
plot_gazepoint_scr_events()
Plot Gazepoint SCR events on an EDA signal
plot_gazepoint_scr_specification_curve()
Plot an SCR specification curve
plot_gazepoint_signal_activity()
Plot Gazepoint biometric signal activity
plot_gazepoint_time_resets()
Plot Gazepoint time resets and time-order flags
recommend_gazepoint_biometric_exclusions()
Recommend Gazepoint biometric exclusions
report_gazepoint_data_quality()
Report Gazepoint data quality
standardise_gazepoint_plot_contract()
Standardise a Gazepoint plot return contract
standardize_gazepoint_plot_contracts()
Standardize Gazepoint plot return contracts
write_gazepoint_biometrics_report_tables()
Write Gazepoint Biometrics report tables

Other exported helpers

align_gazepoint_biometrics_to_ttl()
Align Gazepoint biometric samples to TTL events
analyze_gazepoint_ac_susceptance()
Analyse AC EDA admittance and susceptance recordings
analyze_gazepoint_cardiorespiratory_causality()
Analyse cardiorespiratory Granger-style directionality
analyze_gazepoint_skin_potential()
Analyse endosomatic skin-potential recordings
baseline_correct_gazepoint_gsr()
Baseline-correct Gazepoint GSR/EDA
baseline_correct_gazepoint_hr()
Baseline-correct Gazepoint heart rate
baseline_correct_gazepoint_pupil()
Baseline-correct Gazepoint pupil size
calculate_gazepoint_rsa()
Calculate respiration-informed RSA proxy features
check_gazepoint_biometric_columns()
Check Gazepoint biometric columns
chunk_gazepoint_biometrics()
Chunk Gazepoint biometric data into fixed analysis episodes
classify_gazepoint_eda_response_pattern()
Classify descriptive Gazepoint EDA response patterns
classify_gazepoint_scr_intervals()
Classify SCRs into FIR, SIR, and TIR latency intervals
clean_gazepoint_rr_intervals()
Clean RR or IBI intervals using HeartPy-style methods
compare_gazepoint_hr_ibi_consistency()
Compare Gazepoint HR and IBI-derived heart rate
compute_gazepoint_ppg_frequency_measures()
Compute Gazepoint pulse/PPG frequency-domain measures
compute_gazepoint_ppg_measures()
Compute HeartPy-style pulse/PPG measures
compute_gazepoint_signal_band_power()
Compute signal band power
compute_gazepoint_signal_correlation()
Compute correlation between two Gazepoint signals
compute_gazepoint_signal_phase_locking()
Compute phase-locking value between two signals
compute_gazepoint_signal_power_spectrum()
Compute signal power spectrum
convert_gazepoint_gsr_to_conductance()
Convert Gazepoint GSR resistance to conductance
correct_gazepoint_eda_temperature()
Correct EDA for ambient or body temperature
correct_gazepoint_ppg_hampel()
Apply Hampel-style correction to raw pulse/PPG data
correct_gazepoint_rri_artifacts_local()
Correct local RRI/IBI artifacts
create_gazepoint_biometrics_checklist()
Create a Gazepoint Biometrics reporting checklist
create_gazepoint_biometrics_feature_inventory()
Create a gpbiometrics feature inventory
create_gazepoint_biometrics_methods_text()
Create Gazepoint Biometrics methods text
create_gazepoint_eda_analysis_pipeline()
Create a Gazepoint EDA analysis pipeline guide
create_gazepoint_preregistration_template()
Create a Gazepoint biometrics preregistration template
decompose_gazepoint_eda()
Decompose Gazepoint GSR/EDA into tonic and phasic components
denoise_gazepoint_eda_autoencoder()
Denoise EDA using a user-supplied autoencoder reconstruction model
denoise_gazepoint_eda_wavelet()
Denoise EDA using dependency-light Haar wavelet shrinkage
denoise_gazepoint_ppg_autoencoder()
Denoise PPG using a user-supplied autoencoder reconstruction model
denoise_gazepoint_quantization_noise()
Add small uniform noise to reduce quantization overlap
detect_active_biometric_channels()
Detect active Gazepoint biometric channels
detect_gazepoint_biometric_schema()
Detect the schema of Gazepoint biometric data
detect_gazepoint_biometric_timebase()
Detect the likely timebase of Gazepoint biometric data
detect_gazepoint_doubly_stochastic_changepoints()
Detect stochastic change points in noisy biometric signals
detect_gazepoint_ppg_onsets()
Detect BioSPPy-style PPG pulse onsets
detect_gazepoint_ppg_peaks()
Detect HeartPy-style pulse/PPG peaks in Gazepoint exports
detect_gazepoint_scr_events()
Detect SCR-like events in Gazepoint GSR/EDA data
detect_gazepoint_scr_peaks()
Detect Gazepoint SCR peaks
detect_gazepoint_time_columns()
Detect Gazepoint biometric time columns
detrend_gazepoint_rri_window()
Detrend RRI/IBI intervals in windows
enhance_gazepoint_ppg_peaks()
Enhance pulse/PPG peaks using repeated local baseline removal
estimate_gazepoint_breathing_rate_from_ibi()
Estimate breathing rate from RR/IBI frequency content
estimate_gazepoint_eda_recovery_times()
Estimate BioSPPy-style EDA recovery times
estimate_gazepoint_samplerate_datetime()
Estimate sampling rate from datetime stamps
estimate_gazepoint_samplerate_mstimer()
Estimate sampling rate from a millisecond timer
estimate_gazepoint_signal_lag()
Estimate lag between two Gazepoint biometric signals
extract_gazepoint_beats_kmeans()
Extract heartbeat candidates from Gazepoint pulse using k-means
extract_gazepoint_bilateral_eda_asymmetry()
Extract bilateral EDA asymmetry features
extract_gazepoint_eda_complexity()
Extract EDA complexity features
extract_gazepoint_eda_spectral_power()
Extract frequency-domain EDA spectral power
extract_gazepoint_eda_tvsymp()
Extract time-varying spectral EDA features
extract_gazepoint_edr_pca()
Extract ECG-derived respiration using PCA
extract_gazepoint_hrv_asymmetry()
Extract heart-rate asymmetry features
extract_gazepoint_hrv_features()
Extract time-domain HRV features from Gazepoint IBI intervals
extract_gazepoint_hrv_fragmentation()
Extract heart-rate fragmentation features
extract_gazepoint_hrv_fuzzy_csi()
Extract FuzzyEn and Lorenz-plot CSI HRV features
extract_gazepoint_hrv_geometric()
Extract geometric HRV features
extract_gazepoint_hrv_nonlinear()
Extract nonlinear HRV features from IBI/RR intervals
extract_gazepoint_hrv_rcmse()
Extract refined composite multiscale entropy from HRV intervals
extract_gazepoint_hrv_rqa()
Extract HRV recurrence quantification analysis features
extract_gazepoint_pdr_signals()
Extract PPG-derived respiration proxy signals
extract_gazepoint_ppg_templates()
Extract BioSPPy-style PPG pulse templates
extract_gazepoint_respiration_ceemdan()
Extract respiration proxy using a CEEMDAN-style bridge
extract_gazepoint_scr_recovery_times()
Extract SCR recovery times
extract_gazepoint_ttl_events()
Extract Gazepoint TTL marker events
filter_gazepoint_ibi_implausible()
Filter implausible Gazepoint IBI values
filter_gazepoint_ppg_butterworth()
Apply a second-order Butterworth-style low-pass filter to pulse/PPG data
filter_gazepoint_ppg_signal()
Apply generic filtering to Gazepoint pulse/PPG data
fit_gazepoint_convolution_glm()
Fit PsPM-style event-related convolution GLM
flip_gazepoint_ppg_signal()
Flip a Gazepoint pulse/PPG signal
format_gazepoint_biometrics_feature_inventory()
Format the gpbiometrics feature inventory for users
fuse_gazepoint_respiration_kalman()
Fuse respiration proxies using a Kalman filter
import_gazepoint_biometric_folder()
Import a folder of Gazepoint Biometrics exports
import_gazepoint_biometrics()
Import a Gazepoint Biometrics export
import_gazepoint_data_summary()
Import a Gazepoint Data Summary export
import_gazepoint_lsl_xdf()
Import Gazepoint-related streams from an LSL/XDF file
join_gazepoint_biometrics_to_gp3tools()
Join Gazepoint Biometrics data to gp3tools-style eye-tracking data
join_gazepoint_biometrics_to_master()
Join Gazepoint Biometrics to a master table
model_gazepoint_eda_point_process()
Model EDA events as a dependency-light point process
model_gazepoint_hr_point_process()
Model heartbeats as a dependency-light point process
model_gazepoint_hrv_ipfm()
Model heartbeat timing using an IPFM-style impulse train
process_gazepoint_ppg_segmentwise()
Process Gazepoint pulse/PPG data in overlapping HeartPy-style segments
reconstruct_gazepoint_ppg_clipping()
Detect and reconstruct clipped pulse/PPG samples
regress_gazepoint_pupil_luminance()
Regress stimulus luminance from pupil diameter
reject_gazepoint_ppg_peaks()
Reject implausible pulse/PPG peaks using RR-interval thresholds
remove_gazepoint_ppg_baseline_wander()
Remove baseline wander from Gazepoint pulse/PPG data
run_gazepoint_automated_statistics()
Run automated exploratory statistics for Gazepoint feature tables
run_gazepoint_biometrics_real_data_readiness()
Run a final real-data readiness gate for Gazepoint biometrics data
run_gazepoint_biometrics_workflow()
Run a Gazepoint Biometrics workflow
run_gazepoint_eda_analysis_pipeline()
Run a six-phase Gazepoint EDA/GSR analysis pipeline
run_gazepoint_online_design_optimization()
Run blockwise online design optimization decision support
run_gazepoint_scr_multiverse()
Run a multiverse of SCR scoring specifications
run_gazepoint_scr_threshold_sensitivity()
Run Gazepoint SCR threshold sensitivity checks
run_gpbiometrics_shiny()
Launch a lightweight gpbiometrics Shiny dashboard
run_gpbiometrics_shiny_annotator()
Launch a lightweight gpbiometrics Shiny peak/artifact annotator
scale_gazepoint_ppg_sections()
Scale Gazepoint pulse/PPG signals within sections
scale_gazepoint_ppg_signal()
Scale a Gazepoint pulse/PPG signal
screen_gazepoint_eda_nonresponders()
Screen Gazepoint EDA/SCR nonresponders
simulate_gazepoint_biometrics()
Simulate Gazepoint-style biometric signals
smooth_gazepoint_biometrics()
Smooth a Gazepoint biometric signal
smooth_gazepoint_ppg_signal()
Smooth a Gazepoint pulse/PPG signal
standardise_gazepoint_adaptive_ema() standardize_gazepoint_adaptive_ema()
Adaptive EMA normalization for non-stationary EDA
standardise_gazepoint_biometric_names()
Standardise Gazepoint biometric column names
standardize_gazepoint_biometrics_within_unit() standardise_gazepoint_biometrics_within_unit()
Standardize biometric signals within participant or other analysis units
standardise_gazepoint_range_correction() standardize_gazepoint_range_correction()
Standardise SCR or SCL using within-participant range correction
standardise_gazepoint_zscore() standardize_gazepoint_zscore()
Standardise SCR or SCL using intra-individual z-scoring
summarise_gazepoint_aoi_biometrics()
Summarise biometric signals by AOI
summarise_gazepoint_biometric_validity()
Summarise validity and availability of Gazepoint biometric signals
summarise_gazepoint_biometrics_feature_inventory()
Summarise the formatted gpbiometrics feature inventory
summarise_gazepoint_biometrics_workflow()
Summarise a Gazepoint Biometrics workflow object
summarise_gazepoint_dial_windows()
Summarise Gazepoint engagement-dial windows
summarise_gazepoint_engagement_windows()
Summarise Gazepoint engagement-dial windows
summarise_gazepoint_full_biometric_windows()
Summarise full Gazepoint biometric windows
summarise_gazepoint_gsr_tonic_phasic()
Summarise tonic and phasic GSR/EDA components
summarise_gazepoint_gsr_windows()
Summarise Gazepoint GSR/EDA windows
summarise_gazepoint_hr_windows()
Summarise Gazepoint heart-rate windows
summarise_gazepoint_hrv_features()
Summarise time-domain HRV features from Gazepoint IBI/RR intervals
summarise_gazepoint_ibi_hrv_windows()
Summarise Gazepoint IBI-derived HRV windows
summarise_gazepoint_ibi_windows()
Summarise IBI/RR windows
summarise_gazepoint_multimodal_windows()
Summarise Gazepoint multimodal biometric windows
summarise_gazepoint_scr_event_windows()
Summarise Gazepoint SCR responses in event windows
sync_gazepoint_biometrics_with_gaze()
Synchronise Gazepoint Biometrics with gaze data
test_gazepoint_hrv_nonlinearity()
Test HRV nonlinearity using surrogate data
validate_gazepoint_biometrics()
Validate a Gazepoint Biometrics export

Remaining roadmap helpers

Final roadmap helpers for SCR recovery, pupil events, tracking, PPG quality, event alignment, validation, and reproducibility metadata.

compute_gazepoint_scr_habituation()
Compute SCR habituation across trials
summarize_gazepoint_scr_recovery()
Summarize SCR recovery around events
summarize_gazepoint_pupil_events()
Summarize event-related pupil responses
summarize_gazepoint_tracking()
Summarize Gazepoint tracking validity
audit_gazepoint_pupil_luminance()
Audit pupil-luminance confounding
extract_gazepoint_ppg_morphology()
Extract simple PPG pulse morphology metrics
flag_gazepoint_ppg_quality()
Flag segment-level PPG quality
import_gazepoint_event_log()
Import a generic Gazepoint-compatible event log
match_gazepoint_events_to_biometrics()
Match events to biometric windows
assert_gazepoint_columns()
Assert that required Gazepoint columns are present
gpbiometrics_info()
Print gpbiometrics reproducibility information

Exact roadmap backlog helpers

Schema standardization, export-schema audit, multimodal simulation, sampling and sync QC, AOI/scanpath summaries, manifests, PPG template quality, and HRV wavelet-style summaries.

standardize_gazepoint_column_names()
Standardize common Gazepoint column names
audit_gazepoint_export_schema()
Audit a Gazepoint export schema
simulate_gazepoint_multimodal_data()
Simulate a small multimodal Gazepoint-style dataset
assess_gazepoint_sampling_irregularity()
Assess sampling irregularity in Gazepoint time series
diagnose_gazepoint_sync_drift()
Diagnose synchronization drift between two time bases
summarize_gazepoint_aoi_dwell()
Summarize AOI dwell time and entries
summarize_gazepoint_scanpath_metrics()
Summarize simple scanpath metrics
create_gazepoint_analysis_manifest()
Create a Gazepoint analysis manifest
compute_gazepoint_ppg_template_similarity()
Compute PPG beat-template similarity
compute_gazepoint_hrv_wavelet_psd()
Compute a simple Haar-style HRV wavelet PSD summary

Front-door audit and missingness

Preflight audit, missingness/gap summaries, and generic signal detrending for messy Gazepoint exports.

audit_gazepoint_biometrics_file() print(<gazepoint_biometrics_audit>) summary(<gazepoint_biometrics_audit>)
Audit a Gazepoint biometrics file before analysis
summarize_gazepoint_missingness()
Summarize missingness and gap structure in Gazepoint data
detrend_gazepoint_signal()
Detrend a Gazepoint signal

Alignment, AOI, event-locked synthesis, and dashboard

Event-based stream alignment, AOI time-course preparation, multimodal event-locked summaries, and quality-dashboard exports.

align_gazepoint_streams_by_events()
Align two Gazepoint streams using matched event markers
build_gazepoint_aoi_timecourse()
Build a tidy AOI time course
summarize_gazepoint_eventlocked_multimodal()
Summarize event-locked multimodal Gazepoint data
create_gazepoint_quality_dashboard()
Create a compact Gazepoint quality dashboard object

Physiology and QC refinements

HRV segment QC, SCR latency metrics, multimodal signal-lag screening, and exploratory PPG-derived respiration estimation.

flag_gazepoint_hrv_segments()
Flag HRV/RR segments for quality review
compute_gazepoint_scr_latency()
Compute SCR latency metrics from event-locked EDA
compute_gazepoint_signal_lag_matrix()
Compute a pairwise signal-lag matrix
estimate_gazepoint_respiration_from_ppg()
Estimate respiration rate from PPG

Bootstrap condition comparisons

Lightweight percentile-bootstrap comparisons for Gazepoint-derived outcomes.

compare_gazepoint_conditions_bootstrap()
Bootstrap condition comparisons for Gazepoint-derived outcomes

Roadmap compatibility aliases

Short-name aliases and lightweight wrappers for roadmap discoverability.

standardize_gazepoint_columns()
Standardize Gazepoint column names
validate_gazepoint_format()
Validate a Gazepoint-format data frame
clean_gazepoint_pupil()
Clean Gazepoint pupil data
interpolate_gazepoint_pupil_blinks()
Interpolate Gazepoint pupil blink/dropout spans
respiration_from_ppg()
Estimate respiration from PPG
prepare_gazepoint_mixed_model_data()
Prepare Gazepoint data for mixed-model analysis

Export-folder intelligence

Helpers for profiling Gazepoint export folders before full workflow execution.

profile_gazepoint_export_folder()
Profile a Gazepoint export folder before analysis
compare_gazepoint_export_profiles()
Compare Gazepoint export-folder profiles
write_gazepoint_export_profile()
Write a Gazepoint export-folder profile to disk
plot_gazepoint_export_profile()
Plot a Gazepoint export-folder profile

Analysis decision logs

Helpers for recording exclusions, preprocessing choices, thresholds, model settings, cluster-permutation settings, and reviewer-facing workflow decisions.

create_gazepoint_analysis_decision_log()
Create a Gazepoint analysis decision log
add_gazepoint_decision()
Add a decision to a Gazepoint analysis decision log
summarise_gazepoint_decision_log()
Summarise a Gazepoint analysis decision log
write_gazepoint_decision_log()
Write a Gazepoint analysis decision log to disk

Design and event coverage audits

Helpers for checking participant, trial, condition, session, and event coverage before modelling, event-window analysis, or time-course workflows.

audit_gazepoint_experiment_design()
Audit Gazepoint experiment design structure
audit_gazepoint_event_coverage()
Audit Gazepoint event coverage
audit_gazepoint_condition_balance()
Audit Gazepoint condition balance
plot_gazepoint_design_coverage()
Plot Gazepoint design and event-coverage audits

Pupil quality-control and metadata reporting

Helpers for conservative pupil-dropout detection, pupil smoothing, missingness visualization, and metadata validation.

detect_gazepoint_blinks()
Detect likely blink or pupil-dropout samples
smooth_gazepoint_pupil()
Smooth Gazepoint pupil columns
plot_gazepoint_missingness()
Plot missingness across Gazepoint signal columns
validate_gazepoint_metadata()
Validate Gazepoint metadata and required columns

On this page
